name: xf_cep_ex_backlog_order

_finding: OPEN (D-161 recon, pre-existing and PRE-WIDEN-identical): the plain-exists SATISFY EMISSION ORDER family - a first satisfaction over a multi-epoch P backlog fires arrival-FIFO on the oracle ([1,2,3,4,5]) but newest-first-ish on the engine.
